#
# This file was generated by gr_modtool, a tool from the GNU Radio framework
# This file is a part of gr-mlir_aie
#
# SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later
#

########################################################################
# Setup library
########################################################################
include(GrPlatform) #define LIB_SUFFIX

list(APPEND mlir_aie_sources
    mlir_aie_cpp_uint8_impl.cc
    runtime_lib/test_lib/test_utils.cpp
    mlir_aie_cpp_int32_impl.cc
    mlir_aie_cpp_bfloat16_impl.cc
    mlir_aie_cpp_int16_impl.cc
    float32_to_bfloat16_impl.cc
    bfloat16_to_float32_impl.cc
    complex64_to_cbfloat_impl.cc
    cbfloat_to_complex64_impl.cc)

set(mlir_aie_sources
    "${mlir_aie_sources}"
    PARENT_SCOPE)
if(NOT mlir_aie_sources)
    message(STATUS "No C++ sources... skipping lib/")
    return()
endif(NOT mlir_aie_sources)

find_library(XRT_LIB NAMES xrt_coreutil HINTS /opt/xilinx/xrt/lib)

add_library(gnuradio-mlir_aie SHARED ${mlir_aie_sources})
target_link_libraries(gnuradio-mlir_aie gnuradio::gnuradio-runtime     ${XRT_LIB})
target_include_directories(
    gnuradio-mlir_aie
    PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../include>
    PUBLIC $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>
    PUBLIC /opt/xilinx/xrt/include)
set_target_properties(gnuradio-mlir_aie PROPERTIES DEFINE_SYMBOL "gnuradio_mlir_aie_EXPORTS")

target_compile_options(gnuradio-mlir_aie PRIVATE
  -mavx512f
  -mavx512bf16
)

if(APPLE)
    set_target_properties(gnuradio-mlir_aie PROPERTIES INSTALL_NAME_DIR
                                                    "${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib")
endif(APPLE)

########################################################################
# Install built library files
########################################################################
include(GrMiscUtils)
gr_library_foo(gnuradio-mlir_aie)

########################################################################
# Print summary
########################################################################
message(STATUS "Using install prefix: ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}")
message(STATUS "Building for version: ${VERSION} / ${LIBVER}")

########################################################################
# Build and register unit test
########################################################################
include(GrTest)

# If your unit tests require special include paths, add them here
#include_directories()
# List all files that contain Boost.UTF unit tests here
list(APPEND test_mlir_aie_sources)
# Anything we need to link to for the unit tests go here
list(APPEND GR_TEST_TARGET_DEPS gnuradio-mlir_aie)

if(NOT test_mlir_aie_sources)
    message(STATUS "No C++ unit tests... skipping")
    return()
endif(NOT test_mlir_aie_sources)

foreach(qa_file ${test_mlir_aie_sources})
    gr_add_cpp_test("mlir_aie_${qa_file}" ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${qa_file})
endforeach(qa_file)
